title: Women on bikes unite
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The local Christian Motorcyclists Association (CMA) decided to treat some ladies to a breakfast run at Marshmallow Café on Sunday morning, 15 September.

The special ladies' breakfast run brought together a spirited group of 50 female bikers who gathered at Elvis Brew, before taking a short but scenic ride to Marshmallow Café.


> Thankfully the weather played along beautifully.


Here the group enjoyed a delicious breakfast, followed by some fun, games and lucky draw prizes before the highlight of the morning, a talk by George's very own talented artist and inspirational speaker Anthony Noble.

Noble's words left the ladies with a renewed sense of hope and purpose, offering the perfect motivation to start their week on a high note.

Click here for a photo gallery: When women unite on bikes

Sanchia Stanley, a member CMA, enjoyed the run with the rest of the ladies. Photos: Kristy Kolberg

The inspirational Anthony Noble in action.Joeline Roelofse, Chantelle Keyter, Lee du Preez, Donolee Pietersen and Eileen van Zyl are all from Undisputed MCC in Mossel Bay.  ‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
